description: A farmer submits a drone image of a cornfield showing signs of pest damage. The agent must identify the pest and recommend a treatment.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the image to identify the pest causing the damage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the pest as the European Corn Borer.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the economic threshold for the identified pest at the current crop growth stage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct economic threshold for the V10 growth stage.

nodes.task_description: Recommend an appropriate pesticide and application rate based on the infestation level and local regulations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends a suitable pesticide and the correct application rate.
